message:
feat(frankenterm-core): scrollback buffer + resize/reflow (bd-lff4p.1.4)

Replace the skeleton scrollback with a production VecDeque<ScrollbackLine>
ring buffer that preserves Cell attributes (SGR, hyperlinks, wide-char
flags). Key changes:

- scrollback: VecDeque ring with configurable capacity, push_row/pop_newest,
  set_capacity, iter/iter_rev, wrapped-line flag for future reflow
- grid: scroll_up_into() pushes evicted rows to scrollback,
  scroll_down_from() pulls lines back from scrollback
- grid: resize_with_scrollback() handles height changes by pushing/pulling
  rows to/from scrollback with cursor-aware anchoring
- Reflow policy: truncate/extend (no soft-wrap reflow yet)

100 tests, clippy clean, fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
